CStrings:
+ " isn't available in your region."
+ "%{public}s association for span '%{private}s' → personID=%{private}s, asset=%{private}s. Store size: %{public}ld"
+ "Accessibility label for the menu button that opens photo input options"
+ "Allowing re-attach for span '%{private}s' (policy=allowReattach)"
+ "Auto-attaching photo for person '%{private}s' (span: '%{private}s', asset: '%{private}s')"
+ "Can't get an emoji generator instance, this is a programming error."
+ "Cleared all span→person associations"
+ "Constructed analyzer for use case '%s' and seeded with %ld entries"
+ "Create, refine, and explore almost anything you can imagine. Add a description, style, photo, or people you know."
+ "Decision: detach orphaned auto-attached photo (representableID=%{private}s, span='%{private}s')"
+ "Decision: retarget conditioning image %{private}s to span '%{private}s' (stored spanID was stale)"
+ "Detaching orphaned auto-attached photo (personID=%{private}s)"
+ "Failed to construct OnDevicePromptAnalyzer for use case '%s'"
+ "Failed to encode associations for persistence"
+ "Failed to open system photo library (attempt %ld) with error %@"
+ "Giving up opening system photo library after retries: %@"
+ "ImagePlaygroundInternal.PeopleSuggestionAnalyzer"
+ "ImagePlaygroundInternal/PartnerOnboardingSheetModifier.swift"
+ "ImagePlaygroundInternal/PromptAnalyzerProvider.swift"
+ "ImagePlaygroundInternal/SpanPersonAssociationService.swift"
+ "ImagePlaygroundInternal/SpanPersonAssociationStore.swift"
+ "Label on a person in the shelf indicating tapping will change the photo used for that person"
+ "Lifted suppression for %ld span text(s) no longer in prompt: %{private}s"
+ "Lifted suppression for span '%{private}s' after explicit pick"
+ "Loaded %{public}ld span→person association(s) from app-group defaults"
+ "Manage suggestions featuring you and people you know in Image Playground settings."
+ "Message shown when the prompt references a copyrighted fictional character and the user should try a different description."
+ "Message shown when the prompt references a public figure that cannot be generated."
+ "Message shown when the prompt references a trademarked or copyrighted product (e.g. a specific brand or Apple product) and the user should try a different description."
+ "No PHPerson found for '%{private}s'; skipping auto-attach"
+ "No key face crop available for '%{private}s'; skipping auto-attach"
+ "No photo library available; skipping auto-attach for '%{private}s'"
+ "No safety limitation for guardrail violation: %{private}s"
+ "No stored span→person associations found; starting with empty store"
+ "Reconcile detected user-removed photo for span '%{private}s' (representableID=%{private}s)"
